timezone_note: All times below are UTC, written as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. Convert your local time to UTC before adding a window. See README.md for a plain-language walkthrough with examples. This schedule is currently set to always-open (start in the past, end far in the future). Replace the single window below with real dates whenever you want to restrict it.

windows.label: Always open - replace with real window(s) when ready
